task_completion.description: Search for the existing person record for Alice Bowman.

task_completion.description: Open the existing profile/record for Alice Bowman.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed profile or dashboard specifically for the existing 'Alice Bowman' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a Provider account linked to the existing person.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Add Provider', 'Create Provider Account', or similar is opened directly from or linked to Alice Bowman's existing profile.
The exact text 'PROV-8821' is typed into an 'Identifier', 'Provider ID', or similar input field within the provider creation form.

task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Create' button is clicked, followed by a success message or the updated profile showing the new Provider role/identifier.

task_completion.description: Ensure the provider was linked to the existing person without creating a duplicate person record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Absence of a 'Create New Person' form being used. Alternatively, a final search or directory view showing only one 'Alice Bowman' exists in the system.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser or application window being used to navigate and fill out forms, not a terminal executing backend scripts or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the target information into a text editor.

integrity.description: The final state appears to be a genuine application record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target person is 'Alice Bowman'. The provider identifier to be entered is exactly 'PROV-8821'. The agent must link this provider account to the existing person record, resulting in exactly 1 record for Alice Bowman (no duplicate person records should be created).
